name: pi-theme-gruber-darker
description: Gruber Darker theme for the Pi coding agent.
readme: # pi-theme-gruber-darker Gruber Darker theme for the [Pi coding agent](https://pi.dev/). ## Install ```bash pi install git:github.com/vieitesss/pi-theme-gruber-darker ``` Then select `gruber-darker` in `/settings`, or set: ```json { "theme": "gruber-darker" } ``` ## Theme The theme is in [`themes/gruber-darker.json`](themes/gruber-darker.json).
